name: Browned Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the ends from the green beans and remove any strings.
2. Cut each bean in half lengthwise, slicing through the seam on both sides of the beans.
3. Heat the oil in a large skillet over high heat.
4. Add the beans to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes or until they are lightly browned, stirring frequently.
5. Reduce the heat to medium and gradually add the chicken broth, salt, and pepper. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and stir in the lemon juice.
Serving size: 3/4 cup.
